base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of psi_enemy_attacks — a effect_layer (spell_vfx) from 1994 earthbound. Enemy attack VFX — Beam/PSI Starstorm/PSI Fire/Giygas's Attack (final-boss reality-distortion). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
